metadata.description: Public marketplace for Claude Code plugins and MCP clients from CE Dot Net

plugins.name: ace
plugins.description: Code Engine ACE - Intelligent pattern learning with continuous auto-search. v6.4.1: JSONL corruption fix — domain_shift/domain_search events now write compact single-line JSON (was pretty-printed multi-line, corrupting ace-relevance.jsonl). Impact: analysis tools that parse the jsonl line-by-line now work reliably. Empirically verified against installed cache. Requires: Claude Code >= 2.1.100, ace-cli >= 3.15.0.
